task_completion.description: Navigate to the Concept Classes management page in OpenMRS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the OpenMRS Administration page or the 'Manage Concept Classes' list.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new Concept Class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays a form with input fields for a Concept Class (Name, Description, Abbreviation).

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Name for the Concept Class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'SDOH' is visible inside the 'Name' input field of the form.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Description for the Concept Class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Social factors affecting health outcomes' is visible inside the 'Description' input field or text area.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Abbreviation for the Concept Class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'SDOH' is visible inside the 'Abbreviation' input field.

task_completion.description: Save the new Concept Class and verify its creation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the Concept Class was saved, or 'SDOH' is visible as a new entry in the Concept Classes list.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenMRS web interface to create the concept class.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the OpenMRS UI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid local OpenMRS URL (e.g., containing /openmrs/admin/), not a local file path or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, psql, or mysql CLI) being used to insert the concept class.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Concept Class Name is 'SDOH'. The expected Description is 'Social factors affecting health outcomes'. The expected Abbreviation is 'SDOH'. The OpenMRS legacy administration page is located at /openmrs/admin/index.htm.
